subject: Re: Configuring available GPUs?
body:
Andrey, you can specify which GPUs Warp can use in the Nvidia Control 
Panel. 

Launch the Nvidia Control Panel

> Workstation > Manage GPU Utilization > Manage GPU Utilization

There you can specify whether each GPU is used for Graphics and/or 
Computing. This applies to all programs. 

You can also change setting individual programs.

Nvidia Control Panel > Workstation > GPU Utilization > Manage 3D Settings 
(at the bottom of the GPU Utilization window) > Program Settings > Add > 
e.g., Warp > Specify the settings for this program > CUDA - GPU > Setting > 
Use these GPUs

Michael


On Friday, October 18, 2019 at 1:00:38 PM UTC-4, Andrey Malyutin wrote:
>
> Is it possible already, or would it be possible, to edit the config file 
> to restrict which GPUs can be selected to run Warp jobs? I have been 
> testing on the K3 server and I can imagine many users forgetting to 
> unselect display GPU when launching a job. 
>
> Thank you,
>
> Andrey
>
